title: Ape Tax
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by transferToReserves on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls transferToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Unusual sequence of flash loan and reserves transfer
monitoring_rules: BLOCK tx if FLASHLOAN_BORROW && transferToReserves in same tx
summary: The attacker used a flash loan to transfer funds to the reserves contract, exploiting a sequence that allowed them to siphon off funds. A guard could have detected and blocked this by monitoring for flash loans followed by reserves transfers.
